generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly shifting their defense budgets to prioritize local production? While some claim this weakens NATO, the truth is it's making our supply chains more resilient. Just look at Germany's recent move to boost domestic arms manufacturing—it's not isolationism, it's smart sovereignty. #StrongerTogether #DefenseMatters
